base_fit.optimizer_message: CONVERGENCE: NORM OF PROJECTED GRADIENT <= PGTOL

falsification_logic.confirm_like: A0 remains near Milgrom and far from cH0 across physically distinct SPARC subsets under galaxy-level shrinkage fitting.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: The preferred a0 drifts strongly across subsets or some subsets move back toward cH0.

notes: This is a lightweight galaxy-level shrinkage approximation to a hierarchical fit, using only public SPARC machine-readable tables.
Public SPARC RAR source did not expose per-galaxy labels; falling back to pooled fit with a synthetic single-galaxy label, so subset fits are skipped.
